title_si: 1946 අංක 262 දරන (2012 අංක 22 සංශෝධිත) පළාත් පාලන ආයතන මැතිවරණ ආඥා පනත

summary_en: Notice published under the Local Authorities Elections Ordinance (Chapter 262, as amended by Act No. 22 of 2012 and Act No. 16 of 2017) by the Election Commission covering local authority elections, vacancy filling, or member nominations. Part IV(B) — Local Government.
